title: Euphoria season three trailer: Everything we know so far
description: The third season will air on 12 April and picks up five years on from the last episode.
content:
It's been more than four years since the troubled teens of East Highland High School were last on our screens and now the long-awaited show returns on 12 April for a third season.

title: Millions of drivers to receive £830 compensation over car finance mis-selling scandal
description: The Financial Conduct Authority outlined its final plans for an industry-wide scheme on Monday.
content:
Millions of drivers who were mis-sold a car loan have learnt they are eligible for an average payout of £830 after the finance watchdog shared its final plans for an industry-wide scheme.

title: Rice and Saka playing through injury for Arsenal, claims Tuchel
description: England head coach says duo ‘arrived injured’ for international duty but refuses to disclose the nature of their issues
content:
Thomas Tuchel has revealed that Declan Rice has been playing at “70 per cent” for some time because of continued “discomfort”.
The England head coach said Rice’s Arsenal team-mate Bukayo Saka is “the same” as he vehemently defended pulling them out o... [4786 chars]

title: Radcliffe LIVE: Armed police descend on UK market town as 'avoid area' warning issued
description: Motorists have been urged to find alternative routes amid road closures.
content:
